creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165016
Update net/py-kombu to 3.0.32

The most recent release is 3.0.32, while our ports still installs 3.0.29.

The particular problem I'm having with the older version is mentioned here:

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/34198538/cannot-import-name-uuid-generate-random-in-heroku-django

-- and it is reported as fixed in kombu-3.0.30.

My patch also changes the WWW-line in pkg-descr.

The update seems trivial, please, take a look.
